fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the fault reason.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the fault reason code.

fields.name: Exclude Warranty Discount
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you want to exclude a warranty discount for the service item assigned this fault reason code.

fields.name: Exclude Contract Discount
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you want to exclude a contract/service discount for the service item assigned this fault reason code.
